name: Helena Sable
role: Info broker, runs the Gilt Rose
appearance: Human woman, ~55. Composed, controlled.

personality.quirks: Cried once privately at Pirra's return, composed completely afterward. Reveals nothing she doesn't choose to.

notes: 16% Long Arm Trading partner. Access to Casvath coastal relay via Morrow and Selt.

name: Captain Crane
appearance: Human man, fifties. Practical uniform, nothing decorative.

personality.traits: Formerly corrupt, genuinely flipped. Trustworthy within his authority. Practical.

notes: Manages Thorne, Roct, and Kael Voss custody.

name: Jessyl Denmar
role: River Quarter leader, runs Loan Dragon
appearance: Human woman.
notes: Managing Pip situation. Arranged Tormund Coalbeard meeting for Rhuna.

name: Aldous Marre
appearance: Older human man. Precise in movement and dress.
notes: Drafted Dawn Blades charter. Charter complete, council vote in 5 days. 100g owed on completion.

name: Magistrate Orvyn
notes: Handling overflow warehouse title search and ship registration papers (Dawn Rose, Gilt Blades, Sovi — 3 days out).

name: Councillor Adara Voss

personality.traits: Not corrupt. Opposed to Dawn Blades as potential private army.
personality.quirks: Morning tea, Crestfall Street, eighth bell daily.

notes: Uncertain charter vote. Needs to meet Vaz personally. Revivify tour suggested.

name: Big Tam
notes: Flipped early campaign.

name: Gritch
notes: Flipped early campaign.

name: Torvald Ironwood
notes: Reliable contact for weapon and armor work.

name: Calla Denn
notes: Crafting: abyssal hide leather armor for Denna and Pirra, abyssal pauldron left shoulder for Lenn. 95g paid. 10 days remaining.

name: Ossivane Relk
appearance: Sixties, slight, unremarkable face, clever eyes.
notes: Departed for Argentveil. Find him Linden Street antiquities market, Tuesdays. Third sending stone pair and compass available when ready.

name: Tarn
notes: Knowingly managed Pip as Syndicate spy. Warning given. Decision on consequences pending.

name: Pip
appearance: 17 years old.
notes: Mother's debt cleared (Rhuna paid 50g). Father gone to Syndicate debt.

name: Tormund Coalbeard
appearance: Dwarf.
notes: Millhaven approach planning with Rhuna.

name: Morrow
notes: Casvath coastal relay. Say 'grey tide is running' — sends messages within the hour along coastal road north.

name: Selt
notes: Casvath coastal relay. Say 'grey tide is running' — sends messages within the hour along coastal road north.

name: Idy Rossel
notes: Owns Shrike's Perch neutral ground tavern with private Rookery meeting rooms. Near the Gilt Rose.

name: Darius Rent
role: Runs Wayward Warehouse job board, Trade District
appearance: Scarred veteran.

personality.traits: Legitimate. Good standing with Dawn Blades.

notes: Legitimate mercenary work source.

name: Aldric Thorne
appearance: Distinguished bearing. Impeccably dressed even in custody.

items.name: Orvath Account Ring
items.notes: Ring plus passphrase accesses ~180k account. No appearance needed.

items.name: Argentveil Account Ring
items.notes: Ring plus passphrase plus handwritten withdrawal document accesses ~90k account.

items.name: Valdmere Signet
items.notes: Flags to Veth within a day if used. Touch last or use as bait.

personality.quirks: Skimmed hundreds of thousands from council for years.

relationships.notes: Personal arrangement with Veth older than normal council reporting.

notes: 4-month cooperation deal. Full intelligence given. Writing misdirection letter to Veth via backup channel sealed with Valdmere signet — goal is drawing Veth to Ravenquay instead of Khemrise. Comfortable custody.

name: Roct
appearance: Large, quiet. Dead expression of someone paid for difficult situations.
notes: Same custody deal as Thorne. Watching arena for tactical Veth assessment. Described Veth as faster than he looks, fights like it's personal.

name: Kael Voss
role: Former elite Syndicate guard, now double agent
notes: Dispatched to Valdmere with escape cover story to reinsert into Syndicate and feed intelligence back. No contact method established.

name: Sal
notes: Guard custody. Status unclear — probably safe to release or use.

name: Marcus Freeborn
appearance: Human man, late twenties. Formerly enslaved. Wears Egarryn's red masterwork leather armor deliberately — nobody has asked why yet.

items.name: Egarryn's Red Masterwork Leather Armor
items.notes: Worn deliberately. Nobody has asked why yet.

personality.traits: Quiet in the way of someone still finding his voice.
personality.quirks: Gravitating toward leadership naturally, hasn't noticed.

name: Corwin Drake
appearance: Human man, thirties. Guard bearing.

personality.traits: Knows everyone in Ravenquay who owes favors.
personality.quirks: Walks patrol routes even off duty.

notes: Holds Ravenquay sending stone.

name: Sarith Vex
appearance: Human woman, approaching 40. Capable bearing.

personality.traits: Has been running dangerous operations since sixteen. Captain's awareness of every person in a room.

relationships.notes: Ran Denna's network when Denna was sixteen. Professional respect.

notes: Formal Dawn Blades member, no conflicting contracts.

name: Ledwent
appearance: Human man, older. Dark complexion. Impeccable bearing and timing.

personality.quirks: Reveals nothing he doesn't choose to.

name: Crispin
appearance: Young guard.
notes: Family debt being resolved via Rendwick.

name: Tova
role: Analyst — ledgers and shell company thread

personality.traits: Precise, careful. Extraordinary with numbers and patterns. Not a fighter, entirely invaluable.

notes: Working ledgers and shell company thread with Lenn.

name: Drev
role: Former Syndicate Khemrise coordinator, now informant
appearance: Human man, forties. Lean, sharp-featured.

personality.traits: Careful tidiness of a man demonstrating reliability through his surroundings.

notes: Spice import business, northern market, Thorngate Row. Going dark until further notice. Knows council structure and Veth personally. Daughter in Trevash boarding school under assumed name — Veth doesn't know about her.

name: Rendall
appearance: Human man, thirties. Slight, ink on fingers. Clean, competent.

personality.traits: Clean, competent. Reorganized Glicken's desk immediately.

notes: Harbor watch on all three Dawn Blades ships.

name: Harwick

personality.traits: Careful tidiness of a man demonstrating reliability through his surroundings.

notes: Former Syndicate adjacent. Signed confession leverage. Building relay network with rotating 7-day cipher (Lenn improved it). Wool business selling to Argentveil consortium — half proceeds to Dawn Blades, approximately 2 weeks out.

name: Toreval Caine
appearance: Late twenties, lean, capable hands. Takes genuine pride in the Copper Wheel's appearance.

personality.traits: Self-contained composure of someone who learned to keep his face neutral around dangerous people.
personality.quirks: Denna may have made him during reconnaissance.

notes: One week window — full intelligence on mother's operation offered in exchange for exit solution.

name: Fennick
appearance: Broad-shouldered, weathered. Longshoreman's build with guard's eyes.

personality.traits: Twelve years moving cargo, asking no questions. Now asking them.

notes: Former Thorne cargo handler. Revealed fourth warehouse location to Vaz.

name: Aldric Foss
notes: Staying at estate. Supplying barrels for winery operation.

name: Sovi
appearance: Girl, approximately ten. Small, serious assessment eyes. Dark hair. Carries notebook always.

personality.quirks: Doesn't cry easily. Speaks only a southern language — Petra has partial fluency.

relationships.notes: Petra has partial fluency in her language.

notes: Dusken Coast origin. Staying at Khemrise estate.

name: Davoreen
appearance: Human woman, forties.

personality.traits: Careful stillness of someone who survived by becoming invisible, now discovering she doesn't need to.
personality.quirks: Conducting one-on-ones with refugees. Finding her voice.

notes: Sister somewhere in Khemrise — finding her is on the list.

name: Legend
appearance: Sixties, lean, precise hands. Medical bag always on hook by door out of long habit.

personality.quirks: Medical bag always on hook by the door — long habit.

notes: Removes collars. Syndicate threatened him into compliance for years. Staying at estate voluntarily. Daughter safely in Argentveil.

name: Aldric
notes: Trevash fisherman. Know every cove and inlet between Trevash and Khemrise. Broken tooth cove 2 miles north of Trevash — deep, hidden, only they know it. Dawn Blades informants on coastal road. Briefed on Veth's ship — sabotage if opportunity arises, fully informed choice.

name: Pell
notes: Trevash fisherman. Know every cove and inlet between Trevash and Khemrise. Broken tooth cove 2 miles north of Trevash — deep, hidden, only they know it. Dawn Blades informants on coastal road. Briefed on Veth's ship — sabotage if opportunity arises.

name: Rosten Alurath
notes: Antiquities shop, Merchant Quarter. Worth a visit.

name: Seris
appearance: Assassin-type.

items.name: Locket
items.notes: Returned by Vaz as trust gesture.

notes: Not yet full member. Currently surveilling Drev in Khemrise.

name: Lord Belverbridge
notes: Untouched. Proof needed for removal — payment schedule letter found in strongbox needs combining with ledger entries. Helena would know what to do with it.

name: Aunt Blaise
notes: Untouched.

name: Merren
notes: Witnessed Veth's ship in Trevash. Now in Ravenquay.

name: Drev's Daughter
notes: Boarding school under assumed name. Veth doesn't know about her.

name: Aldren Casvath
appearance: Sixties, silver at temples. Weathered from sea time without being a sailor.
notes: Funded Dawn Blades 15,000g. Coastal relay network via Morrow and Selt — grey tide running. Second payment on Khemrise confirmed clean. Contact through Morrow and Selt.

name: Rendwick Pendwick

personality.quirks: "When you need wool moved, find me."

notes: Freed, reunited with family. Selling wool business to Argentveil consortium. Available for wool logistics.

name: Galealzre
appearance: Vaz's brother.

relationships.notes: Brothers. Warm but distant — Vaz didn't know his brother trusted him until Kessara said so.
On same council. Warned about Calvane.

notes: Receiving sending stone pair and full intelligence letter. Dangerous proximity to Serath Calvane on same council.

name: Salla Kern
notes: Sent job offer regarding Kerra. Follow-up pending.

name: Erasmus

combat.notes: 300g per job, purely transactional, no loyalty.

notes: Probably checks Wayward Warehouse. Still available.

name: Veth
appearance: Unknown. Faster than he looks, fights like it's personal.

combat.notes: Never been beaten in 15 years per Roct. Faster than he looks, fights like it's personal. Travels light — max 6 exceptional people.

relationships.notes: Personal arrangement older than normal council reporting structure.

notes: Valdmere base, appearance unknown. Ship with 12 armed men already sent toward Khemrise. Holds sending stone — attempting contact with Dawn Blades repeatedly. Receiving misdirection letter from Thorne.

name: Serath Calvane
role: Syndicate financial architect / city council trade committee

personality.traits: Cautious, profit motivated. Moves slowly and carefully.
personality.quirks: Doesn't know Relk has left Argentveil.

relationships.notes: On Argentveil city council together. Dangerous proximity.

notes: On Argentveil city council trade committee for 6 years. Financial architect of Syndicate operations.

combat.notes: Hard to pin down — moves constantly between cities.

personality.traits: Manages recruitment operations across entire region — false contracts, young people funneled to labor.

relationships.notes: Her operation took Lyria's brother Aldren three years ago.

name: Garrick Ironvein

combat.notes: 8 competent ex-military guards. Single road in, good sight lines. Gotten comfortable, never been challenged.

notes: 40-50 collared workers in deep tunnels. Free workers complication — decent pay, don't ask questions.

name: Vrethka
notes: Vethara's mother. Sealwalker's Cloak. Shaman level 7. New Witness — two days perception. Northern clan elder. Grandmother was Witness, mother was Witness, Vrethka learning. Bow of the Returning Three recovered from Ravine Stalker site — her weapon now. Traveling south with Dawn Blades.

name: Vethara
notes: Vrethka's daughter. War ending — given two weeks before approaching Cindermarch. Proud, practical, afraid of being wrong and learning to survive it. Possible Witness — names weapons in the Witness way. Northern metalwork trade contact.

name: Varath Ichta
notes: Elder's daughter. Wanted to go south her entire life. First Varath to leave the valley. Heading to Cindermarch to meet Kern. Dawn Blades contact. Will report back to her people about the south.

name: Tessaly
notes: Three generations of between-existence ended. Grandmother reunited — below for three generations, returned when door closed. Seventeen adults and six children traveling south. No clan, no current territory. Dawn Blades offering orientation and welcome. Tessaly's unnamed daughter — strong Witness perception, identified by Yungkin.

name: Vrethka's Grandmother
notes: Went below voluntarily three generations ago to tend from underneath. Returned when door closed. Tessaly's grandmother. Below preserved her beyond normal lifespan. Adjusting to above.

name: Yungkin
notes: Named by Vaz. Child of the Eldest — exists comfortably in boundary bleed between above and below. Followed company since blank space. Tended boundary alongside Witnesses unprompted. Made itself smaller out of courtesy for above travelers. Patient with children. Not threatening. Unique — no precedent for above travel by Eldest's children.
